KR Token Report

Generated 2026-07-04T20:38:21.606Z · 301 tokens (light) · 301 tokens (dark) · site: /sessions/inspiring-intelligent-darwin/mnt/Kirsten Rossiter

Health checks — 5/8 passing

✓ Build (light): source tokens → dist
  • 301 source tokens all present in dist.
✓ Build (dark): source tokens → dist
  • 301 source tokens all present in dist.
✓ Site sync: dist/light/variables.css ↔ vendor/tokens.css
  • Files identical — site is running the latest build.
✓ Consumer contract: 15 tokens referenced by the site
  • Every var(--kr-…) the site references is defined in vendor/tokens.css.
✓ Fonts: site Google Fonts link ↔ font-family tokens
  • Loaded families (Cormorant Garamond, Jost, Lora) match tokens exactly.
✗ Lint: doubled group names (e.g. --kr-colour-colour-…)
  • 71 tokens have a repeated path segment (fix in name transform or restructure source): e.g. --kr-colour-colour-background-default, --kr-colour-colour-background-subtle, --kr-colour-colour-background-muted, --kr-colour-colour-background-surface, --kr-colour-colour-background-raised, …
✗ Lint: numeric font tokens without units
  • 45 font tokens are bare numbers (e.g. line-height: 80 means 80× in CSS, not 80px). Add px transforms before the site consumes them. Examples: kr-fonts-line-height-display-large=80, kr-fonts-line-height-display-medium=65, kr-fonts-line-height-display-small=53, kr-fonts-line-height-headline-large=45, …
✗ Hardcoded hex: 13 distinct values in site CSS/HTML
  • #1a2235 — matches NO token (contact.html, functions/stripe-webhook.js, thank-you.html)
  • #1c1814 — matches NO token (functions/api/contact.js, functions/stripe-webhook.js, thank-you.html)
  • #e6ddcd — matches NO token (functions/api/contact.js, functions/stripe-webhook.js)
  • #9a938a — matches NO token (functions/api/contact.js, functions/stripe-webhook.js)
  • #fbf8f2 — matches NO token (contact.html)
  • #9a3b2e — matches NO token (contact.html)

  • #1a1310 — matches NO token (styles.css)
